ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election occurred */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Current state of the election (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code or FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county to which the precinct belongs */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_type" TEXT /* Type of the precinct (e.g., Voting Precinct, Mail Ballot Precinct) */,
  "precinct_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office contested */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District in which the office is contested */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., Federal, State, Local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is contesting */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Candidate's party affiliation (e.g., Democrat, Republican) */,
  "candidate_contact_info" TEXT /* Candidate's contact information (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which the votes are counted */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the votes */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote cast (e.g., In-Person, Mail-In, Provisional) */,
  "vote_status" TEXT /* Status of the vote (e.g., Counted, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for the office in the election */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the election */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the election result (e.g., Certified, Contested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
